predictions.reasoning: Art. 20 explicitly requires management bodies to approve cybersecurity risk-management measures, oversee implementation, and be held liable for infringements—directly matching this board-level oversight process.
Art. 20 mandates that management body members follow training and encourages entities to offer regular cybersecurity training to employees—directly aligned with this training capability.

Art. 20 references cybersecurity risk-management measures under Article 21; ISMS capability governs the policies and organisational measures needed to establish and maintain such risk-management frameworks.
